[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000011110 4
1 0101000110 4
2 0000111000 3
3 1011100011 6
4 0101000111 5
5 0110111111 8
6 1011111111 9
7 0010101011 5

01 1010000001 3
12 0100100100 3
23 0100011101 5
34 1001011001 5
45 1010100101 5
56 1110101000 5
67 1101001011 6
70 1010100111 6

71 1111011001 7
